wine_experiences.name: Schloss Johannisberg Bibliotheca Subterranea Cellar Visit
wine_experiences.description: Visit the cellar dating to around 1100 below Schloss Johannisberg, including the Bibliotheca Subterranea library of 25,000 bottles with the oldest from 1748. Riesling tasting follows the cellar tour.
wine_experiences.price_range: Cellar tours for groups of 40 plus; flight tastings for groups of 10 plus
wine_experiences.group_size: 10 plus for tastings, 40 plus for cellar tour

wine_experiences.name: Kloster Eberbach Vineyard Walk and Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Kloster Eberbach, 65346 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_experiences.description: Guided vineyard walk through the Steinberg parcel of the Hessische Staatsweinguter Kloster Eberbach, 900 metres from the abbey. Cistercian viticulture explained on site, followed by a tasting in the WineBar1136.
wine_experiences.price_range: Guided vineyard walk with tasting from EUR 25 per person

wine_experiences.name: Ruedesheim Cable-Car Up and Vineyard Walk Down
wine_experiences.description: Take the cable car up over the Riesling vines to the Niederwald Monument then walk down through the Berg Roseneck and Berg Rottland slopes back to Ruedesheim. Pair with a tasting at one of the town vinotheks.
wine_experiences.price_range: One-way cable car ticket from around EUR 7 per person

wine_experiences.name: Robert Weil Graefenberg Vertical Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Private vertical tasting at Weingut Robert Weil in Kiedrich exploring multiple vintages of Kiedricher Graefenberg Riesling. Bookable in advance for small groups by the estate's private-tasting team.

wine_experiences.name: Schloss Vollrads Coach House Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Tasting in the converted coach house of the 800-year-old Schloss Vollrads estate, Riesling-only across Gutswein, Ortswein and Grosse Lage tiers, with optional paired menus at the orangery or squire's house.
wine_experiences.price_range: Tasting prices on request; paired menus higher

verified.address_quoted: Schloss Vollrads GmbH & Co. Besitz KG | 65375 Oestrich-Winkel | Germany

wine_experiences.name: Rhein-Heli Helicopter Flight over the Rheingau
wine_experiences.address: Ebentaler Hof, 65385 Rüdesheim am Rhein, Germany
wine_experiences.description: Scenic helicopter round flight from the Ebentaler Hof above Ruedesheim near Aulhausen at 300 metres elevation. Routes over the Niederwald, Rüdesheimer Berg vineyards and the Loreley UNESCO valley.
wine_experiences.price_range: Round flights priced per route; from around EUR 99 per person

wine_experiences.name: Skytours Ballooning Rheingau Hot-Air Flight
wine_experiences.description: Hot-air balloon flight over the Rheingau departing from Schierstein on the Rhine in Wiesbaden, run by Skytours Ballooning. Drift southwest over the vineyards depending on wind, with views of Eltville and Hattenheim.

wine_experiences.name: WINEAROUND Self-Guided Ruedesheim Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Buy four WINECOINS, claim a tasting glass from the Rheingau-Taunus tourist office and stroll between seven partner wineries and vinotheks in old Ruedesheim, redeeming a glass at four of them.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 19.50 per person for four wine coins

wine_experiences.name: Rheingau Riesling Rad e-Bike Wine Route
wine_experiences.description: Self-guided e-bike day along the Rheingau wine route between Ruedesheim, Eltville and Hattenheim with picnic backpack and saddle bag, ending with tastings at partner estates. Rentals delivered to hotels.
wine_experiences.price_range: E-bike day hire from around EUR 35 per person

wine_experiences.name: Paddle Steamer Goethe Wine Cruise
wine_experiences.description: Day cruise on the restored 1913 paddle steamer Goethe between Koblenz and Ruedesheim through the UNESCO Upper Middle Rhine Valley with onboard Rheingau wine and dining. Daily Nostalgia Route in season.
wine_experiences.price_range: Day cruise from around EUR 60 per person

wine_experiences.name: Balthasar Ress Moderated Cellar Tour and Tasting
wine_experiences.description: Guided cellar tour and moderated tasting of the Balthasar Ress estate range at the Hattenheim winery. Estate Rieslings and Pinots across Nussbrunnen, Hallgartener Jungfer and other VDP sites.
wine_experiences.price_range: Moderated tasting from around EUR 25 per person
wine_experiences.group_size: Small to medium groups by appointment

wine_experiences.name: Drosselgasse Evening Tasting Walk
wine_experiences.description: Self-guided evening walk along the 144-metre Drosselgasse in Ruedesheim, stopping at the Drosselhof, Lindenwirt and Rüdesheimer Schloss wine taverns for Rheingau Riesling and Spatburgunder by the glass.
wine_experiences.price_range: Glass pricing per venue from around EUR 5 per pour
